name: Chaurice (4) (Creole Pork Sausage Making)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the pork using the coarse knife of a meat grinder.
2. Add the onions and garlic to the grinder and regrind them.
3. Mix in the seasonings thoroughly.
4. Remove the cutting blades from the grinder.
5. Attach the sausage stuffer to the grinder.
6. Attach the sausage casing as per your basic sausage recipe instructions.
7. Refeed the mixture into the grinder and then through the sausage stuffer.
